title: Freshsales vs Microsoft Teams
description: Compare Freshsales vs Microsoft Teams — a crm & sales platform versus a communication solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Freshsales (CRM & Sales) and Microsoft Teams (Communication) serve different primary purposes. Freshsales has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is crm & sales or communication capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Freshsales and Microsoft Teams?
faqs.answer: Freshsales is a crm & sales tool, while Microsoft Teams is a communication platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Freshsales replace Microsoft Teams?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Freshsales or Microsoft Teams?
faqs.answer: Freshsales ($9–$69/user/mo) and Microsoft Teams (Free – $12.50/mo per user) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
